title: Everlight
description: Everlight is a friendly Minecraft modpack which was created in order to give players a more enhanced but familiar experience. Everlight offers you to build, explore and create your very dream world, without getting overwhelmed by ever-increasing choice of
body:
### Everlight Cosy Fantasy Adventure 🌿

Everlight is a soft, whimsical Minecraft mod pack, which is designed to feel like being hugged in a warm blanket, not very heavily modded but significantly more than vanilla. Wherever you want to go, a dream-cottage, dungeoneering, or having elaborate contraptions, it has something to make everyone interested.

### Features:

- Build your fantasy home with beautiful interiors, tracks and decor-blocks
  
- Explore new biomes, dungeons, and secrets in a green world.
  
- Tech in Create, Mekanism, and AE2
  
- Class, origin, skills and equipment improvement mechanics, reminiscent of RPGs
  
- The storage drawers, iron chests, and automation aids will assist you to organise easily
  
- Rubidium and FerriteCore other performance-optimised uitels
  

Everlight would appeal to the solitary gamer, pacifistic architect, the adventurous explorer or even a group of friends who need to enjoy time in the funnily fantasy world.

### ✨ Cozy. Magical. Yours.
